page_metadata.biotools__summary: pssRNAMiner is a web server which identifies trans-acting siRNA clusters in plants, as well as their potential phase initiators. Users input a small RNA dataset and specify a transcript-genomic library for mapping.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: pssRNAMiner is a web server which identifies trans-acting siRNA clusters in plants, as well as their potential phase initiators. Users input a small RNA dataset and specify a transcript-genomic library for mapping.
